Who We Are

About Sparkle Shine Facility

Sparkle Shine Facility provides professional cleaning, maintenance, landscaping, housekeeping and facility management services throughout Singapore. We combine experience, reliability, and modern technology to create clean, safe and sustainable environments.

Our certified team is committed to delivering the highest standards of service — helping businesses and homeowners maintain pristine spaces that inspire productivity, health and wellbeing.

🎯 Our Mission

To deliver exceptional facility management services that exceed client expectations, promote sustainability, and create healthier environments across Singapore.

👁 Our Vision

To be Singapore's most trusted and eco-conscious facility management company, setting the standard for quality and reliability in the industry.

💎 Our Values

Integrity, professionalism, sustainability, and customer-first approach guide everything we do.

What We Offer

Our Premium Services

Comprehensive facility management solutions tailored to your needs, delivered by our experienced and certified team.

🧹

Janitor Services

Professional commercial and industrial cleaning services designed to maintain pristine environments for your business operations.

Learn more →
🌿

Landscapes & Gardening

Expert landscape maintenance and garden care solutions to keep your outdoor spaces lush, green and beautifully maintained.

Learn more →
🏡

Housekeeping

Residential and commercial housekeeping services delivering a spotless, organized and comfortable living and working environment.

Learn more →
🔬

Clean Room Cleaning

Specialist clean room sanitation and maintenance services meeting industry-grade standards for contamination-sensitive environments.

Learn more →
🪣

Carpet Shampoo Cleaning

Deep cleaning and carpet restoration services that remove stubborn stains, allergens and odors, reviving your carpets to their original glory.

Learn more →
💧

Hijet Washing

Professional high-pressure jet washing services for exterior surfaces, car parks, walkways, facades and industrial equipment.

Learn more →
⚡

Electrical & Plumbing Works

Certified electrical and plumbing repair and installation services ensuring safe, code-compliant systems in your facility.

Learn more →
🔨

Handyman Work

Versatile general maintenance and repair solutions for both residential and commercial properties, handled by our skilled handymen.

Learn more →
🏗

Building Maintenance Service

Complete building facility maintenance management — from inspections and preventive care to emergency repairs and full-facility upkeep.

Learn more →

How We Work

Our Simple 6-Step Process

A streamlined, transparent workflow from your first call to final sign-off — ensuring a seamless experience every time.

📞

Contact Us

Reach out via phone, WhatsApp or email to discuss your requirements.

🔍

Site Inspection

Our team visits your premises to assess scope and specific needs.

📄

Quotation

We provide a clear, itemized quotation with no hidden charges.

⚙️

Service Execution

Our certified professionals carry out the work with precision and care.

✅

Quality Assurance

A thorough quality check is conducted before we consider the job done.

😊

Customer Satisfaction

We follow up to ensure you are fully satisfied with our service delivery.
